subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the All-Merciful, dawning-places of the suns of certitude, ye who stand firm and immovable in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن و مشارق شموس الایقان و الثابتون الراسخون علی المیثاق و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
